name: General Physician
when_to_visit: For general health concerns, initial evaluation, and referrals to specialists

name: Cardiologist
when_to_visit: For heart-related symptoms, chest pain, blood pressure issues, or cardiovascular risk

name: Dermatologist
when_to_visit: For skin conditions, unusual moles, persistent rashes, or cosmetic skin concerns

name: Gynecologist
when_to_visit: For menstrual issues, hormonal problems, reproductive health, or pregnancy care

name: Endocrinologist
when_to_visit: For hormonal disorders, diabetes management, thyroid issues, or metabolic conditions

name: Pulmonologist
when_to_visit: For persistent breathing problems, chronic cough, or lung conditions

name: Neurologist
when_to_visit: For persistent headaches, neurological symptoms, or nerve-related conditions

name: Gastroenterologist
when_to_visit: For persistent digestive problems, stomach pain, or gastrointestinal conditions

name: Psychiatrist
when_to_visit: For mental health concerns, persistent anxiety, depression, or emotional difficulties

name: Emergency Care
when_to_visit: For life-threatening emergencies, severe injuries, or symptoms requiring immediate attention
